case_title: ERA GOLDEN GATE PROPERTIES VS UNIVERSAL MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ERA GOLDEN GATE PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO GARY ALAN PRESIDENT, UNIVERSAL MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC.
DEFT'S CHALLENGE OF VENUE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISIONER. LATE FILING.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-28-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-09-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED BY THE COURT TO 5/9/07 AT 10:00 A.M. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE, FILED. $10 FEE PAID. SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-09-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-08-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE.
REQUEST FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE FOR THE JUNE 8, 2007, HEARING AT 3:30PM. COPIED TO PLTF & SENT TO COMM PS FOR APPROVAL.
ORDER ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE AND GRANT OF DEFENDANT'S REQUEST OF TELEPHONE APPEARANCE-MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-08-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-22-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE IS GRANTED. CLERK SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT OF PROCEDURES FOR APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ERA GOLDEN GATE PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
